chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-195 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 15.02.2018. Mr. Mohsin Raza Gopang, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, A.A.G and Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. It is stated by the learned Counsel for the petitioner that the alleged detainee namely Aamir Farooque has safely reached to the home and he is no more missing person, therefore, according to him, this petition has become infructuous and liable to be disposed of. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of having become infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE A.H.
